name: midi
description: MIDI input/output primitives via CoreMIDI. Based on iospharo MIDIPlugin.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: midi-init
primitives.description: Initialize the MIDI subsystem. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-port-count
primitives.description: Get the number of available MIDI ports. Output: port count.

primitives.name: midi-port-name
primitives.description: Get the name of a MIDI port. Input: port index. Output: port name string.

primitives.name: midi-open
primitives.description: Open a MIDI port for communication. Input: port index. Output: handle.

primitives.name: midi-close
primitives.description: Close a MIDI port. Input: handle. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-read
primitives.description: Read pending MIDI data from a port. Input: handle. Output: data list.

primitives.name: midi-write
primitives.description: Write raw MIDI data to a port. Inputs: handle, data list. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-note-on
primitives.description: Send a MIDI Note On message. Inputs: handle, note (0-127), velocity (0-127). Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-note-off
primitives.description: Send a MIDI Note Off message. Inputs: handle, note (0-127). Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-cc
primitives.description: Send a MIDI Control Change message. Inputs: handle, controller (0-127), value (0-127). Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-program
primitives.description: Send a MIDI Program Change message. Inputs: handle, program (0-127). Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: midi-clock
primitives.description: Get the current MIDI clock timestamp in microseconds. Output: timestamp integer.

primitives.name: midi-sysex
primitives.description: Send a MIDI System Exclusive message. Inputs: handle, data list. Output: success boolean.
